132 _39MG STR_GOAL_CD (39Mg) Locomotion - Stairs: Goal CHAR 2 A score indicating the desired goal for the patient's ability to go up and down 12 to 14 stairs (one flight) indoors in a safe manner at discharge. 01 = Helper -
